title: Cobblemon Roboto Recipes
description: Hello friends, these are some recipes for non-craftable cobblemon items
body:
This datapack adds recipes for items that are impossible to craft in Cobblemon and its mods:

Terashards:

Bug: Beehive


![Bug](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3628a3d77c3d9c5e27e52fc40f671b5dd562577f.png)


Dark: Ender Pearl


![Dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa80ba3a0f148bedd33aed1de921c524a288f203.png)


Dragon: Blaze Powder


![Dragon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e80bde94c3aab1eff36c179016427634d949945e.png)



Electric: Lighting Rod


![Electric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9e910618e4459ebe648d9b6ce4d7edb4e3d7eb4.png)

![Fairy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/608eef148db2ebc2a3ab56dd275c8f715d12417b.png)

![Fighting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd301e6ef66dce1e92e98a66c1e2d1dd43b82e53.png)

![Fire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24260834121c5ef0452e14ce2200b608d4dd594f.png)

![Ghost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3480616d2571c4909469b013c67ddbfb271b95a7.png)

![Grass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de6ee12652bcc90256945cc6ee2ac120e00db6d2.png)

![Ground](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d3936472128085d16b582f7d65316ced221f4ac.png)



Ice: ice (duh)



![Ice](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d42b588b1dcf81662fa5fa2c234ab764be3ada2.png)
